revisions.what_changed: Full M12 Ad Creative workshop: 26 Danilo tabs + Bootstrap files 10A/10B → 22 production files (18 content files: strategy, psychology, libraries, systems, tracking; 1 dialogue summary with 10 rounds to saturation; 1 OpKit; 2 system files). 3-persona dialogue (D2C Creative Director, Performance Media Buyer, UGC Creator) identified 4 critical post-dialogue files: creative_brief_1page.md, creative_library_maintenance.md, ugc_creator_production_guide.md, brand_voice_evolution.md. Key innovations: 3-tier creative replenishment system (derivatives/new concepts/high-production), 5-indicator fatigue detection matrix, engineering-driven testing hierarchy (angle → hook → format), quarterly library maintenance feedback loop, brand voice 3-phase maturation (Challenger → Expert → Leader), comprehensive FTC compliance throughout. Cross-integrated with M11 (VSL production, 10 hooks), M13 (media buying, 2-4 week fatigue timelines, attribution model), M14 (testing protocols, kill criteria), M15 (landing page psychology), M23 (UGC creator workflows), M27 (ICP targeting). Quality 8.2/10: production-ready with minor intelligence gaps resolvable Month 3-6 with real testing data.
revisions.quality_rationale: Strengths: Comprehensive coverage (22 files), systematic frameworks (testing, fatigue, replenishment), cross-TUP integration, phase-gated evolution, FTC compliance rigor. Weaknesses: 4 files required post-dialogue (initial scope gaps), marine plasma education strategy under-addressed initially, brand voice maturation missing initially, some operator-centric templates needed creator-facing variants. Intelligence gaps (angle performance, fatigue timelines, narrative resonance) require 3-6 months real data. Score 8.2/10 reflects production-ready content with minor refinements + medium intelligence gaps, significantly better than generic D2C creative guides (lacks category-specific rigor, supplement-specific constraints, engineering mindset).
